tasks.label: Start Nginx
tasks.command: sudo nginx -s stop -c /app/.vscode/nginx-dev.conf 2>/dev/null || true; sudo nginx -c /app/.vscode/nginx-dev.conf

tasks.label: Start Backend
tasks.command: cd /app/server && SSO_ALLOW_PRIVATE_NETWORKS=true uv run fastapi dev src/main.py --host 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: Run Keycloak (local SSO)
tasks.detail: Start the local Keycloak SSO provider and print its credentials. Works from inside the dev container (via docker-outside-of-docker) or from a host terminal.
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile sso up -d keycloak && echo '' && echo '==================== Le Coffre local SSO (Keycloak) ====================' && echo ' Admin console : http://localhost:8180   (admin / admin)' && echo '' && echo ' Configure in Le Coffre (Admin -> SSO; unlock the vault first):' && echo '   Client ID     : lecoffre-client' && echo '   Client secret : lecoffre-dev-secret' && echo '   Discovery URL : http://keycloak:8080/realms/lecoffre/.well-known/openid-configuration' && echo '' && echo ' SSO test login : testuser / password   (testuser@example.com)' && echo '' && echo ' Note: the discovery URL uses keycloak:8080 (the backend reaches it over the' && echo '       docker network); the browser is still sent to http://localhost:8180 to log in.' && echo '========================================================================'
